translations.en: I am waiting at the traffic light.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi ở đèn giao thông.
translations.nl: Ik sta te wachten bij het stoplicht.
translations.hi: मैं ट्रैफिक सिग्नल पर इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang menunggu di lampu lalu lintas.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; intransitive, denotes the action.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Ampel' after 'an'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'an', marking location.

translations.en: The traffic light will be green soon.
translations.es: El semáforo se pondrá en verde pronto.
translations.fr: Le feu va bientôt passer au vert.
translations.it: Il semaforo sta per diventare verde.
translations.pt: O semáforo vai ficar verde daqui a pouco.
translations.vi: Đèn giao thông sắp chuyển sang xanh.
translations.nl: Het stoplicht gaat zo op groen.
translations.hi: सिग्नल जल्दी ही हरा हो जाएगा.
translations.el: Το φανάρι θα γίνει σύντομα πράσινο.
translations.id: Lampu lalu lintas akan segera berubah menjadi hijau.
translations.ro: Semaforul va deveni verde în curând.
translations.cs: Semafor se brzy přepne na zelenou.
translations.ja: 信号はもうすぐ青になります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular nominative; subject of 'wird'.
Auxiliary/copular verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; marks change of state with a predicative complement.
Temporal adverb indicating imminence; modifies the predicate ('wird … grün').
Predicative adjective complement of the copula; describes the resulting state of the subject.

sentences.target: Wir gehen bei Grün an der Ampel über die Straße.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən baɪ̯ ɡʁyːn an deːɐ̯ ˈampl̩ ˈyːbɐ diː ˈʃtʁaːsə/

translations.de: Wir gehen bei Grün an der Ampel über die Straße.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈɡeːən baɪ̯ ɡʁyːn an deːɐ̯ ˈampl̩ ˈyːbɐ diː ˈʃtʁaːsə/
translations.en: We cross on green at the traffic light.
translations.es: Cruzamos la calle cuando el semáforo está en verde.
translations.fr: On traverse quand le feu est vert.
translations.it: Attraversiamo quando il semaforo è verde.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在红绿灯变绿时过马路。
translations.yue: 我哋等到紅綠燈轉綠先過馬路。
translations.ru: Мы переходим дорогу, когда загорается зелёный.
translations.pt: Atravessamos a rua quando o semáforo fica verde.
translations.tr: Işık yeşile dönünce karşıdan karşıya geçiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi băng qua khi đèn chuyển sang xanh.
translations.ar: نحن نعبر عندما تصبح الإشارة خضراء.
translations.nl: We steken over als het stoplicht op groen staat.
translations.uk: Ми переходимо дорогу, коли світлофор стає зеленим.
translations.hu: Akkor megyünk át, amikor zöld a lámpa.
translations.hi: हम हरी बत्ती पर सड़क पार करते हैं.
translations.pl: Przechodzimy przez ulicę, gdy jest zielone światło.
translations.el: Περνάμε όταν το φανάρι γίνεται πράσινο.
translations.nb: Vi går over når lyset blir grønt.
translations.id: Kami menyeberang jalan saat lampu hijau.
translations.sv: Vi går över när det blir grönt.
translations.ro: Trecem când semaforul se face verde.
translations.cs: Přecházíme, když je na semaforu zelená.
translations.da: Vi går over, når der er grønt.
translations.fi: Ylitämme tien, kun liikennevalo on vihreä.
translations.ja: 信号が青になったら渡ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; motion verb.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a time/condition PP.
Nominalized color, neuter singular dative; object of 'bei', refers to the green light.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Ampel' after 'an'.
Common noun, feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'an'.
Preposition selecting accusative; indicates movement across a path.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; agrees with 'Straße' after 'über'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; object of 'über', denotes the path crossed.

sentences.target: An der Ampel biegt der Bus rechts ab.
sentences.reading: /an deːɐ̯ ˈampl̩ biːkt deːɐ̯ bʊs ʁɛçts ap/

translations.de: An der Ampel biegt der Bus rechts ab.
translations.ipa: /an deːɐ̯ ˈampl̩ biːkt deːɐ̯ bʊs ʁɛçts ap/
translations.en: At the light, the bus turns right.
translations.es: En el semáforo el autobús gira a la derecha.
translations.fr: Au feu, le bus tourne à droite.
translations.it: Al semaforo l'autobus gira a destra.
translations.zh-Hans: 公交车在红绿灯处右转。
translations.pt: No semáforo, o ônibus vira à direita.
translations.vi: Xe buýt rẽ phải ở đèn giao thông.
translations.ar: الحافلة تنعطف يمينًا عند إشارة المرور.
translations.nl: Bij het stoplicht slaat de bus rechtsaf.
translations.hu: A lámpánál a busz jobbra kanyarodik.
translations.hi: बस सिग्नल पर दाएँ मुड़ती है.
translations.pl: Przy światłach autobus skręca w prawo.
translations.el: Στο φανάρι το λεωφορείο στρίβει δεξιά.
translations.nb: Ved trafikklyset svinger bussen til høyre.
translations.id: Di lampu lalu lintas, bus belok ke kanan.
translations.sv: Vid trafikljuset svänger bussen åt höger.
translations.ro: La semafor, autobuzul virează la dreapta.
translations.da: Ved lyskrydset drejer bussen til højre.
translations.ja: 信号でバスが右に曲がります。

Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; part of a separable verb with 'ab' placed sentence-final (V2 order).

Common noun, masculine singular nominative; subject of the verb.
Directional adverb; modifies the verb phrase, indicating the direction of turning.
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'biegt' to form 'ab-biegen' (to turn off), placed at clause end.

The traffic light will be green soon.
We cross on green at the traffic light.
